title: bridelia polystachya
intro: Bridelia polystachya, also known as the country mallow or Bridelia, is a medicinal plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. Bridelia polystachya is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting liver health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
